prompt: Create a realistic vertical portrait photo of a young woman standing centered on a tree-lined park path during golden hour. She wears a simple sleeveless white summer dress with a softly gathered waist and scalloped neckline, hands gently clasped in front of her waist, facing the camera with a relaxed upright posture. Use dramatic backlighting from the upper right, with warm sunlight filtering through green leaves, soft lens flare glow, bright rim light outlining her dark shoulder-length hair, and delicate flyaway strands illuminated around her head. The background should be a natural park with tall tree trunks, dappled sunlight on grass and dirt path, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, and a warm cinematic photographic look. Keep the composition full-body to knees, centered, natural skin tones, high-resolution DSLR realism, 85mm portrait lens feel, soft contrast, no text, no watermark. Customize the subject as young woman with dark shoulder-length hair, outfit as sleeveless white summer dress, setting as tree-lined park path, lighting as warm golden-hour rim light from the upper right, and mood as soft serene cinematic.
